description: An examination of ethnicity, race, and justice, with a specific emphasis on US Latinos, the largest minority group in the United States.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: C&E SOC/​SOC  140,210,211,SOC 181,FOLKLORE/​AFROAMER/​AMER IND/​ASIAN AM/​CHICLA  102,CHICLA 201,CHICLA 210, CHICLA 230,POLI SCI/​CHICLA  231,HISTORY/​CHICLA/​GEN&WS  245,LEGAL ST/​SOC  131, orPOLI SCI/​LEGAL ST  217
